expectations.text: Explains RAM mode uses obs_type='ram' parameter, NOT a separate env ID
expectations.evidence: Shows correct gym.make('ALE/Pong-v5', obs_type='ram') and explicitly lists ALE/Pong-ram-v5 as WRONG

expectations.text: States that ALE/Pong-ram-v5 does NOT exist
expectations.evidence: Explicitly lists both ALE/Pong-ram-v5 and Pong-ram-v5 as wrong with ERROR comments

expectations.text: Mentions need to import ale_py before gym.make()
expectations.evidence: "import ale_py  # MUST import before gym.make() — registers ALE namespace"

expectations.text: States RAM observation shape is (128,) uint8
expectations.evidence: "obs: Box(128,) uint8 — 128 bytes of raw Atari 2600 RAM"

expectations.text: Notes that AtariPreprocessing is NOT needed for RAM mode
expectations.evidence: "No wrappers needed — no AtariPreprocessing, no FrameStack, no grayscale conversion"

expectations.text: Provides correct API call: gym.make('ALE/Pong-v5', obs_type='ram')
expectations.evidence: Full code example with obs_type='ram' and full_action_space=False
